data.title: DOGE Reportedly Fires FDA Staff Reviewing Elon Musk's Neuralink: 'We Should Be Worried About The Whole Trial,' Says Former Official
data.description: Several U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) employees involved in the review of Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) Chief, Elon Musk's private brain implant company, Neuralink, were dismissed over the weekend.

data.title: Baidu's Robotaxi Service Hits 1.1 Million Paid Rides In Q4, Expands To Hong Kong As 1st Operator Allowed To Test Autonomous Vehicles
data.description: Gary Black highlighted metrics from Baidu's autonomous driving, noting that the robotaxi service achieved 1.1 million paid rides in Q4.

data.title: Trump Praises Elon Musk's Starlink Rollout, Says SpaceX Rocket Recovery Is 'Like You Grab A Beautiful Little Baby:' 'Nobody Else Can Do It'
data.description: Donald Trump praised SpaceX CEO Elon Musk's rapid deployment of Starlink satellite internet during recent North Carolina disasters

data.title: Elon Musk's DOGE Reports Nearly $4.7 Trillion Untraceable In Federal Payments, Makes TAS Tag Mandatory
data.description: The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) has made the use of the Treasury Access Symbol (TAS) mandatory, after finding $4.7 trillion in Federal Payments 'untraceable'.

data.title: S&P 500 Settles At Record High Ahead Of Fed Minutes: Investor Sentiment Improves, Fear & Greed Index Moves To 'Neutral' Zone
